---
title: "gruppemde_uge_1"
subtitle: "`gruppemde_uge_1`"
description: "gruppemde_uge_1"
---

<!--
NEVER EDIT MANUALLY. This documentation was auto-generated by `seedcase-flower`.
If you want to edit the content, please make changes to the `datapackage.json` file.
-->

- Path: `resources/gruppemde_uge_1/data.parquet`
- Primary key: (`event`)

| Name                                | Title                             | Type   | Description                                                                                                                                             |
|-------------------------------------|-----------------------------------|--------|---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| `event`                             | The unique name of the event      | string | The unique name identifying the event when the form was filled in.                                                                                      |
| `center`                            | Research center                   | string | The research center where the data item was recorded.                                                                                                   |
| `date_group_meeting_1`              | date_group_meeting_1              | date   | Date for group meeting. Group meeting week 1.                                                                                                           |
| `staff_initials_group_meeting_1`    | staff_initials_group_meeting_1    | string | Initials of the dietitian responsible for conducting the group meeting. Group meeting week 1.                                                           |
| `attended_group_meeting_1`          | attended_group_meeting_1          | string | Indicates participant's attendance to the group meeting. Group meeting week 1.                                                                          |
| `weight_group_meeting_1`            | weight_group_meeting_1            | number | Participant's weight in kilograms, measured with light clothing using the BMI scale in room 1.15. Measured to the nearest 0.1 kg. Group meeting week 1. |
| `cgm_group_meeting_1`               | cgm_group_meeting_1               | string | Indicates whether the participant has been fitted with a CGM. Group meeting week 1.                                                                     |
| `cgm_no_group_meeting_1`            | cgm_no_group_meeting_1            | string | The reason why, if the participant didn't get the CGM on. Group meeting week 1.                                                                         |
| `sensorid_group_meeting_1`          | sensorid_group_meeting_1          | string | The sensors ID number. Group meeting week 1.                                                                                                            |
| `cgmreader_group_meeting_1`         | cgmreader_group_meeting_1         | string | The number of the CGM reader. Group meeting week 1.                                                                                                     |
| `cgm_info_group_meeting_1`          | cgm_info_group_meeting_1          | string | Whether the participant has been informed about the use of CGM. Group meeting week 1.                                                                   |
| `gcm_envelop_given_group_meeting_1` | gcm_envelop_given_group_meeting_1 | string | Whether a zip bag was given for the CGM. Group meeting week 1.                                                                                          |
| `remarks_group_meeting_1`           | remarks_group_meeting_1           | string | Indicates whether there are any special remarks regarding the participant and what they are. Group meeting week 1.                                      |

: Fields in the `gruppemde_uge_1` resource.
